User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system, including their role and associated company if applicable.

id.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

name.description: The user's display name. For 'company' roles, this is the company name.

role.description: The role of the user within the system.

companyId.description: For 'company' roles, this is their own UID. For 'courier' roles, this is an optional reference to a company.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the user's avatar image.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

Shipment.title: Shipment
Shipment.description: Represents a shipment record in the logistics system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the shipment entity.

shipmentCode.description: Unique shipment code in the format SH-YYYYMMDD-0001.

orderNumber.description: Order number associated with the shipment.

recipientPhone.description: Phone number of the shipment recipient.

deliveryDate.description: Expected delivery date for the shipment.

reason.description: Reason for a particular shipment status (e.g., delayed).

totalAmount.description: Total amount due for the shipment.

paidAmount.description: Amount already paid for the shipment.

collectedAmount.description: The actual amount collected by the courier, used for partial deliveries.

courierCommission.description: The commission earned by the courier for this specific shipment.

companyId.description: Reference to the User (with 'company' role) that owns this shipment.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a logistics/delivery company. A user with role 'company' has a corresponding document here.

id.description: Unique identifier for the company entity. This is the same as the User's UID.

Courier.title: Courier
Courier.description: Represents a courier responsible for delivering shipments. A user with role 'courier' has a corresponding document here.

id.description: Unique identifier for the courier entity. This is the same as the User's UID.

commissionRate.description: Fixed commission amount per delivered or evaded shipment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the governorate entity.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, including their role.

params.name: userId
params.description: Firebase Auth UID of the user.

params.name: shipmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the shipment document.

definition.description: Stores company information. The document ID is the User UID of the company.

params.name: companyId
params.description: Unique identifier for the company document.

definition.description: Stores courier information. The document ID is the User UID of the courier.

params.name: courierId
params.description: Unique identifier for the courier document.

params.name: governorateId
params.description: Unique identifier for the governorate document.

definition.description: Documents in this collection grant admin role to the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: Firebase Auth UID of the admin user.

definition.description: Documents in this collection grant company role to the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: Firebase Auth UID of the company user.

definition.description: Documents in this collection grant courier role to the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: Firebase Auth UID of the courier user.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure now includes a 'company' role. Companies are users that can manage their own shipments. Couriers are independent and are assigned to shipments directly. The 'companies' collection stores public profiles for these company users. The 'shipments' collection now uses 'companyId' to link to the user UID of the owning company.
